res.title: Researches & Cooperation
res.subtitle: Go
res.intro_desc: Box Lab is dedicated to the fundamental research and application of advanced functional polymer materials. Bridging synthetic polymer chemistry with interfacial engineering, we strive to overcome the inherent physical boundaries of traditional soft matter. Our research paradigm centers on tailoring molecular designs to achieve resilient, intelligent, and sustainable macroscopic functionalities. Through this approach, we aim to provide innovative and scalable material solutions for emerging challenges in flexible electronics, robotic sensing, and sustainable technologies.
